title: Forager: Add-ons
description: Extra features and packs for Forager
body:
Forager Add-ons are extra packs that add additional features for Forager!


Packs can be standalone but were made to be used in conjunction with Forager
Always put any extensions above the base pack in order for them to work!

For Versions 1.19 - 1.21.10

Add-ons

2D alternative Replaces the custom blocks of Forager with 2D versions.
Extra Mobs This pack adds extra details to mobs, including more cow, goat, and sheep horns, fluffer creepers, and angelic ghasts. Also available with a Fresh animations version. Requires ETF/EMF or Optifine to work.
Fresh Animations (FA) Compatible pack for Fresh Animations. Requires ETF/EMF or Optifine to work.
Connected Textures Adds connected textures for various blocks, such as grass, stone ect. Requires Continuity or Optifine to work.
Connected Clear Glass This pack adds connected clear glass textures. Requires Continuity or Optifine to work.
Detailed Stained glass Changes glass to antique styled textures. Also available with a Connected textures version, which requires Continuity or Optifine to work.
Light Armor Makes Armor less obtrusive.
Glowing ores Adds Emissive textures to ores.
Bushy Leaves Remodels leaf blocks to be fuller.

Terms

Feel free to: - Add to servers - Modify content for personal use - Share with proper credit

Please do not:

- Reupload or sell - Modify or copy designs and/or claim ownership - Share without credit
If you are unsure, please ask permission in a DM

If you want to get the latest updates or access to newest versions first, check out my Patreon or Kofi!
